strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend services to frontend UIs and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job titles suggest senior-level experience, but role requires junior/mid-level individual contributor mindset
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to renewable energy/construction tech
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with strong open-source and teaching credentials, but his senior-level track record and lack of explicit domain alignment with renewable energy or construction tech raise questions about role fit, despite relevant technical capabilities.
